title: astronium fraxinifolium var. glabrum
intro: Astronium fraxinifolium var. glabrum, also known as the smooth astronium or smooth Guanacaste, is a variety of the Astronium fraxinifolium tree, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Astronium fraxinifolium var. glabrum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in herbal supplements and topical creams, highlighting its versatility in various herbal preparations.
